name: Taroimo
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 523; Episode 418

Taroimo (タロイモ) is a cyborg dog from the Future Kingdom of Barjimoa on Karakuri Island. It is a cybernetically modified dog that is seen capable of launching missiles from its mouth.  It was first seen attacking Franky, who was sent flying on Karakuri by Bartholomew Kuma, because it thought he was a prey. It was then told to stop by its two owners after they realised who it was attacking. It then started dancing along with Franky and its owners.   It is numbered, just like the Battle Franky´s or the Zombies of Thriller Bark. Its number is 28.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
